case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. JOSE ISMAEL ALVARADO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $890.56 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, JOSE ISMAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.
